why: Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound minecraft:select_known_packs must dispatch from the official framed packet id to a select-known-packs body decoder through Stevenarella packet_by_id. This is packet-support evidence only and is separate from registry hydration, known-pack negotiation completion, Configuration completion, or Play readiness.
what: The Rust oracle test configuration_select_known_packs_framed_dispatch_matches_official_oracle_answer panics while exercising packet::packet_by_id(775, State::Configuration, Direction::Serverbound, packet id 7, official body bytes) because v26_1_2.rs does not map Configuration serverbound packet id 0x07.

evidence.summary: Generated from official client.jar direct calls: KnownPack.vanilla(String), ServerboundSelectKnownPacks(List<KnownPack>), ServerboundSelectKnownPacks.STREAM_CODEC, ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND.codec().encode/decode(ServerboundSelectKnownPacks), ConfigurationProtocols.SERVERBOUND_TEMPLATE.details().listPackets(...), ServerboundSelectKnownPacks.knownPacks(), KnownPack.namespace(), KnownPack.id(), KnownPack.version(), and KnownPack.isVanilla().
Manifest declares the exact Rust oracle test and framed_dispatch_decode comparison surface.
Rust test reads the manifest and answer, splits official framed VarInt packet id from body bytes, and calls packet::packet_by_id for Configuration serverbound select_known_packs dispatch.

Current Protocol 775 Configuration serverbound mapping contains client_information id 0x00, finish_configuration id 0x03, keep_alive id 0x04, pong id 0x05, and resource_pack id 0x06, but not select_known_packs id 0x07.

observed_failure: bad packet id 0x7 in Serverbound Configuration; Stevenarella panicked while dispatching official Configuration serverbound select_known_packs packet id 7
